designSystem.style: Dark emotional design with vibrant violet-to-pink gradient accents, deep midnight backgrounds, and expressive card-based layouts that convey creativity and introspection

screens: Forge - Emotion input with chip selection, shimmer loading, and generated mood board with color palette, typography, and composition cues
Capture - Mock camera viewfinder with context strip (time/weather/location), moment analysis, and expandable recent capture cards
Library - Searchable creative recipe collection with filter tabs and expandable recipe cards showing full color palettes
Settings - User profile, animated dark/light theme toggle, intensity slider, export format selector, and about section
